description: AI Core - Chat Processing Pipeline: SK base, Facilitator agent, pipeline orchestrator, debounce, AI tools, event consumers, frontend indicators.

userStories.title: AI Service Django Setup - Semantic Kernel Base
userStories.description: As a developer, I want AI service with SK base (BaseAgent, kernel factory, model router, token tracker) for unified Azure OpenAI integration.
acceptanceCriteria: Django boots, SK SDK installed, BaseAgent abstract class with async process()
Kernel factory creates SK Kernel with Azure OpenAI
Environment vars validated: AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT, API_KEY, API_VERSION, deployments
Admin params seeded: default_ai_model, escalated_ai_model, ai_processing_timeout, recent_message_count, context_compression_threshold
userStories.notes:
Architecture: tech-stack.md § AI Orchestration, project-structure.md § AI Service
AI: agent-architecture.md § S1, model-config.md § S6-S8
Files: ai_service/settings/base.py, agents/base.py, kernel/{sk_factory,model_router,token_tracker}.py, requirements.txt
Gotchas: SK async only. Azure auth with API key. Router reads admin params at runtime. Handle missing token metadata.

ai_specs: SK + Azure OpenAI, 3 tiers, BaseAgent async, model router

userStories.title: Facilitator Agent Implementation
userStories.description: As the system, I want Facilitator with XML prompt and 6 tools (send_chat_message, react_to_message, update_title, 2 delegation, request_board_changes) for brainstorming.
acceptanceCriteria: FacilitatorAgent extends BaseAgent, system prompt from prompt.py
Tools publish events: ai.chat_response.ready, ai.reaction.ready, ai.title.updated, ai.delegation.started
request_board_changes returns accepted (Board Agent stub in M7)
Mocked Azure OpenAI for tests (fixture files)
userStories.notes:
Architecture: api-design.md § gRPC TriggerChatProcessing
AI: agent-architecture.md § S3.1, system-prompts.md § S1, tools-and-functions.md § Facilitator, model-config.md § S2
Testing: test-matrix.md § T-2.1.03/04, T-2.3.01/02, T-2.4.01, T-2.7.01, T-2.15.01. Test-first with mocked Azure.
Files: facilitator/{agent,prompt,plugins}.py, fixtures/facilitator_response.json
Gotchas: Prompt ~2800 tokens. Async plugins, gRPC to Core. Events via broker. Delegation immediate. Board Agent stub. Fixture mocks.

ai_specs: 6 tools, SK function calling, temp=0.7, events: ai.chat_response.ready, ai.reaction.ready, ai.title.updated

userStories.title: Chat Processing Pipeline Orchestrator
userStories.description: As the system, I want 7-step pipeline (load, assemble, Facilitator, delegation, Board Agent, complete, cleanup) for end-to-end AI processing.
acceptanceCriteria: ChatProcessingPipeline async execute(): 1) Load via GetIdeaContext gRPC, 2) Assemble context, 3) Facilitator, 4) If delegation → agent → re-Facilitator, 5) If board changes → Board Agent (stub logs 'not available'), 6) Publish ai.processing.complete, 7) Cleanup version/abort flag
Version tracking detects stale (version mismatch = abort)
Abort flag at step boundaries, exits early without persisting
userStories.notes:
Architecture: api-design.md § gRPC TriggerChatProcessing, GetIdeaContext
AI: agent-architecture.md § S4.1 (7 steps), § S12 (version), system-prompts.md § second pass
Testing: test-matrix.md § T-2.10.03. Test: trigger, send mid-processing, verify abort.
Runtime Safety: runtime-safety.md § STATE-004
Files: processing/{pipeline,context_assembler}.py, grpc_clients/core_client.py
Gotchas: Version checked before steps. Abort at boundaries. Delegation async. Board stub. gRPC 10s timeout. Context: summary + recent 20 + board + bucket.

ai_specs: 7 steps, version tracking, abort at boundaries, delegation continuation

userStories.title: Debouncer Implementation
userStories.description: As the system, I want debouncer waiting debounce_timer after last message before pipeline, resetting on new message, batching rapid-fire messages.
acceptanceCriteria: start() → countdown → triggers pipeline on expiry
userStories.notes:
Architecture: data-model.md § admin_parameters (debounce_timer 3s)
AI: agent-architecture.md § S4.1, model-config.md § S7
Testing: test-matrix.md § T-2.10.01/02. Test-first: mock time, verify expiry; two messages → one execution.
Runtime Safety: runtime-safety.md § STATE-004, LEAK-005
Files: processing/debouncer.py
Gotchas: asyncio.sleep. Per-idea state dict. Cleanup on unmount. Runtime param read. Publish WebSocket events.

ai_specs: Debounce configurable 3s, state transitions, event: ai.processing {state: debouncing}

userStories.title: send_chat_message Tool
userStories.description: As Facilitator, I want send_chat_message publishing ai.chat_response.ready so Gateway persists and broadcasts.
acceptanceCriteria: Publishes ai.chat_response.ready: idea_id, content, message_type, sender_type=ai, ai_agent=facilitator
[[Item Title]] validated against board, invalid → plain text
Returns message_id, created_at (None at call, Gateway fills)
userStories.notes:
Architecture: api-design.md § ai.chat_response.ready
AI: tools-and-functions.md § S1
Files: facilitator/plugins.py (send_chat_message), events/publishers.py
Gotchas: [[Title]] validated. Event async. Gateway persists via Core gRPC. Placeholder return.

ai_specs: send_chat_message: content, message_type, event: ai.chat_response.ready, board refs validated

userStories.title: react_to_message Tool
userStories.description: As Facilitator, I want react_to_message publishing ai.reaction.ready to place reactions on user messages.
acceptanceCriteria: Validates target sender_type=user (not AI), error if AI message or duplicate
userStories.notes:
Architecture: api-design.md § ai.reaction.ready, data-model.md § ai_reactions UNIQUE
AI: tools-and-functions.md § S2
Testing: test-matrix.md § T-2.7.01/02. Test-first: mock call, verify event; test UNIQUE.
Files: facilitator/plugins.py (react_to_message), events/publishers.py
Gotchas: Validation via Core gRPC. UNIQUE at DB. Error format from tools-and-functions.md.

ai_specs: react_to_message: message_id, reaction_type, event: ai.reaction.ready, validation: user only

userStories.title: update_title Tool
userStories.description: As Facilitator, I want update_title publishing ai.title.updated to generate/update title, respecting title_manually_edited.
acceptanceCriteria: Publishes ai.title.updated: idea_id, title (truncated to 60 chars)
userStories.notes:
Architecture: api-design.md § ai.title.updated, data-model.md § ideas
AI: tools-and-functions.md § S3
Design: component-specs.md § S5.4 (animation)
Testing: test-matrix.md § T-2.3.01/02/03. Test-first: mock call, verify event; test flag reject; test animation.
Files: facilitator/plugins.py (update_title), events/publishers.py
Gotchas: Truncation before event. Flag check via Core gRPC. Browser tab update (frontend). Animation framer-motion.

ai_specs: update_title: title maxLength 60, event: ai.title.updated, validation: title_manually_edited=false

userStories.title: AI Event Consumers in Gateway
userStories.description: As Gateway, I want consumers for ai.chat_response.ready, ai.reaction.ready, ai.title.updated persisting via Core gRPC and broadcasting via WebSocket.
acceptanceCriteria: AIEventConsumer subscribes: ai.chat_response.ready → Core CreateChatMessage + broadcast chat_message, ai.reaction.ready → CreateAIReaction + broadcast ai_reaction, ai.title.updated → UpdateIdeaTitle + broadcast title_update
userStories.notes:
Architecture: api-design.md § Events, tech-stack.md § Error Handling
Testing: test-matrix.md § T-2.7.02. Test-first: mock event, verify gRPC, WebSocket, DB.
Runtime Safety: runtime-safety.md § LOOP-003
Files: gateway/events/consumers.py, gateway/grpc_clients/core_client.py
Gotchas: Background process. Channels layer. Idempotency: Redis/DB. Retry: 1s, 2s, 4s. DLQ. gRPC 10s timeout. Channel group: idea-{idea_id}.

userStories.title: AI Processing Indicator (Frontend)
userStories.description: As a user, I want indicator in chat when AI processing so I know message received.
acceptanceCriteria: Indicator below last message: 'AI is processing...' with animated dots
Visible on WebSocket ai.processing {state: started}, hidden on {state: completed/failed}
userStories.notes:
Design: component-specs.md § S5.4
Testing: test-matrix.md § T-2.12.01/02. Test-first: mock {state: started} → visible; {state: completed} → hidden.
Files: frontend/src/components/chat/AIProcessingIndicator.tsx, hooks/useWebSocket.ts
Gotchas: Position centered. Sequential fade animation. prefers-reduced-motion. WebSocket event: {type: ai_processing, payload: {idea_id, state}}.

components: AIProcessingIndicator — text-sm, muted-foreground, animated dots, centered

userStories.title: Rate Limit Integration
userStories.description: As the system, I want rate limit (chat_message_cap) locking chat after N messages until AI completes.
acceptanceCriteria: Backend: 429 when counter >= chat_message_cap, increments per message, resets on ai.processing.complete
Frontend: input disabled when limited (overlay: 'Chat locked'), WebSocket rate_limit shows toast, unlocks on ai.processing.complete
userStories.notes:
Architecture: data-model.md § admin_parameters (chat_message_cap 5), api-design.md § POST 429
Design: component-specs.md § S5.8
Testing: test-matrix.md § T-2.11.01/02/03. Test-first: send cap → 429; reset on complete; toast on event.
Files: gateway/apps/chat/views.py, frontend/src/components/chat/ChatInput.tsx, hooks/useRateLimit.ts
Gotchas: Counter: Redis (idea_id, 1hr TTL) or in-memory. Reset in consumer. Overlay: bg-card/80, lock icon. WebSocket: {type: rate_limit}. Toast: react-toastify.
